generation.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: seamless full-cell 2D game floor tile source
Input images: Image 1 is a structural reference only for readable square-cell occupancy; do not copy its characters, UI, symbols, room layout, palette, or specific art. Image 2 is only a subject/theme reference for aged ivory marble.
Primary request: create one original square marble floor tile for an abandoned marble conservatory. The tile must read as an entire occupied grid cell, not as a small object inside a cell.
Style/medium: clean 2D cartoon game art, bold dark outline, flat color blocks, limited palette, only 2–3 value steps, very light controlled texture.
Composition/framing: exact orthographic top-down, perfectly square, edge-to-edge opaque artwork. Add a subtle inset grout/bevel line about 3–5% inside the square so the cell boundary remains readable. Opposite edges must repeat cleanly in a 2x2 grid.
Color palette: aged ivory marble, cool blue-gray simplified veins, faint desaturated moss staining, dark cool-gray outline.
Materials/textures: simplified broad marble marks only; no fine realistic veining.
Constraints: fully opaque square; no transparent pixels; no empty margin; no object floating inside the square; no perspective; no cast shadow; no lighting direction; all shading contained inside the tile; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: photorealism, PBR, painterly micro-detail, cinematic light, focal emblem, cracks that terminate abruptly at an edge, external frame, copied elements from Image 1.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: full-cell opaque 2D game obstacle tile
Input images: Image 1 is a structural reference only for obstacles that completely own one square grid cell; do not copy its characters, UI, symbols, room layout, palette, or specific art. Image 2 is only a subject reference for an old conservatory tree.
Primary request: create one original square tree/topiary obstacle tile for an abandoned marble conservatory. It must be a complete solid grid block, not a transparent tree sprite placed inside a floor tile.
Subject: dense mossy tree canopy deliberately shaped into a square hedge-like block, filling the entire square and touching all four edges. A simplified twisted trunk or branch junction is readable near the lower/southern center, but no floor is visible anywhere.
Style/medium: clean 2D cartoon game art, bold dark outline, flat color blocks, limited palette, only 2–3 value steps, very light controlled leaf texture.
Composition/framing: exact orthographic top-down, perfectly square, edge-to-edge opaque artwork. Strong square silhouette with a 3–5% dark contour/inset boundary so the occupied cell reads instantly.
Color palette: moss green, deep foliage green, muted olive, small weathered walnut trunk accents, dark green-black outline.
Constraints: fully opaque square; no transparent pixels; no empty margin; no visible floor; no round isolated crown floating in the cell; no perspective; no cast shadow; no lighting outside the cell; all details contained inside the square; no flowers, pot, fruit, text, logo, or watermark.
Avoid: photorealism, PBR, painterly micro-detail, individual realistic leaves, cinematic lighting, soft transparent edges, circular sprite silhouette, copied elements from Image 1.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: full-cell opaque 2D cartoon game obstacle tile
Input images: Image 1 is ONLY a structural reference for a square obstacle owning an entire grid cell. Image 2 is ONLY a subject cue for a wooden cabinet. Do not copy either image's rendering style.
Primary request: create one original, extremely simplified square wooden cabinet tile for an abandoned marble conservatory. This is a cartoon board-game-like grid block, not a realistic furniture illustration.
Subject: a large square walnut storage cabinet filling the complete square and touching all four edges. Use four or fewer large flat wooden panels. On the lower/southern edge, show one bold central door seam and two simple brass handle shapes. No floor or background is visible.
Style/medium: crisp flat 2D cartoon, thick near-black outline, large clean color shapes, exactly 2–3 value levels, minimal cel shading. Use the graphic simplicity of a readable mobile game tile, not painted concept art.
Composition/framing: exact orthographic top-down, perfectly square, edge-to-edge opaque artwork, strong rectangular silhouette, 3–5% dark inset contour.
Color palette: only dark walnut brown, medium walnut brown, one warm highlight brown, muted brass, near-black outline.
Materials/textures: almost no texture; at most a few broad stylized nicks. NO visible wood grain lines, knots, scratches, cracks, noise, brush texture, or micro-detail.
Constraints: fully opaque; no transparent pixels; no empty margin; no visible floor/wall; no perspective; no cast shadow; all details contained inside the tile; no extra objects; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: photorealism, realistic wood, PBR, painterly rendering, complex texture, many highlights, cinematic lighting, freestanding sprite silhouette, copied elements from Image 1.
